label: Overview
research_use: first-pass company dashboard: quote, key metrics, performance, valuation, capital structure, estimates, chart, news

label: Description
research_use: business description, profile fields, key data, dividends, related securities

label: Percentile Rank
research_use: relative valuation/quality/performance ranks vs own history and peer cohorts

label: Dividend
research_use: dividend policy, growth, yield, payout, payment history and no-dividend detection

label: Ownership
research_use: insider/institutional ownership, transactions, holders, mutual funds and ETFs

label: Earnings History
research_use: reported revenue versus estimates, surprises, price reactions, valuation at report dates

label: Actuals and Consensus
research_use: historical actuals and forward consensus by annual/quarterly period

label: Price Target
research_use: sell-side price targets, ratings distribution, return potential and no-coverage detection

label: Estimates Overview
research_use: forward sales/EBITDA/EBIT/EPS estimate matrix and next-quarter summary

label: Estimates Trends
research_use: estimate revisions and analyst-count trend by fiscal year and metric

label: Highlights
research_use: high-level financial, capital structure and cash-flow metrics across periods

label: Income Statement
research_use: revenue, profit, expense, EPS and supplemental income statement line items

label: Balance Sheet
research_use: asset, liability, equity and capital structure line items

label: Cash Flow
research_use: operating/investing/financing cash flow, FCF and per-share cash metrics

label: Multiples
research_use: historical valuation multiples across sales, earnings and book-value families

label: Enterprise Value
research_use: market cap, debt, cash, EV and capital ratio bridge

label: Profitability
research_use: returns, margins, turnover and liquidity metrics

label: ROIC
research_use: ROIC formula, NOPAT, invested capital and component breakdown

label: Solvency
research_use: leverage, interest coverage, debt coverage and bankruptcy-risk metrics

label: News
research_use: recent company news feed metadata and source/time/title extraction

label: Press Releases
research_use: company press release metadata and dates

label: Filings
research_use: SEC/EDGAR filing list metadata: form, date, source/title

label: Transcripts
research_use: earnings calls, conferences and special-call transcript metadata

label: Historical
research_use: historical price chart, overlays, technical indicators and chart data extraction

label: Comparison
research_use: peer comparison charts across price/performance and valuation metrics

label: Intraday
research_use: intraday OHLCV series, visible data table and market-closed/no-data handling

label: Performance
research_use: performance/total-return time series and high/low markers
